knownIssues.title: Real confirmation UX — currently blocks with error
Google refresh token not in output sanitizer
hasVectorSupport probe per call — no cache
Max plan OAuth on headless Railway — token persistence strategy needed
gws CLI installability on Railway — fallback to Google MCP if not available
SDK session → Slack thread mapping — test --resume with thread_ts
Max plan rate limits — monitor and adjust router threshold if needed
Heavy path fallback to fast path needs testing — verify claude CLI available
Old agent/index.ts, search/, email-scan.ts still in codebase — trim after integration testing

currentSprint.name: SDK Pivot — Hybrid Architecture

Claude Code SDK heavy path integration ✅

currentSprint.progress: Phases 1-4 complete. Build passes. 311/311 tests pass. Ready for integration testing and deployment.

lastSession.keyDecision: Built hybrid agent with fast path (API) and heavy path (SDK). Preserved old code as fallback. Phase 5 trim deferred until integration tested.

thingsNotToRedo: Don't split schema.sql on semicolons
DON'T REBUILD WHAT COMES NATIVELY WITH CLAUDE — use SDK for orchestration
Custom agent loops are worse than Claude Code — proven in session 13
schema.sql must be explicitly copied in Dockerfile
Google OAuth: gws CLI for setup AND for SDK runtime access (no MCP needed)
Don't hard-code bot responses — prompts are in config/prompts/
Startup crawl skips if offline <5 min
Non-owner messages tagged [EXTERNAL]
Audit log sanitized BEFORE writing
keytar uses false sentinel — logs warning only once
File summaries are conclusions, not descriptions — stored as memories
Self-healing compares expected vs actual memory content
Folder path is evidence, not gospel — content wins over structure
One-time migrations use agent_state guard keys
Mid-loop text is NOT the final response — only capture from final turn
Don't force premature answers — let Claude Code finish
Slack markdown block does NOT support tables — use bulleted key-value pairs
Document tasks require reading the actual file, not answering from memory
Policy engine regexes must use (?:^|_) to match prefixed tool names
Always parallelize API fetches, sequential DB writes
Heavy path must fall back to fast path if claude CLI not available
Don't trim old code until integration testing confirms hybrid works end-to-end
Memory MCP server runs as stdio subprocess — needs --data-dir flag pointing to same DB
